about.title: About PriceTH
about.lead: PriceTH is a free price-comparison tool for Thai shoppers — pulling real Shopee Thailand data automatically every 4 hours.
h_how: We scrape live prices and stock from real Shopee Thailand listings 6 times per day (every 4 hours).
AI summarizes each product's strengths and weaknesses from real buyer reviews — content is 90% real data, AI ≤10%.
Products are ranked by rating + sales + discount + data freshness.
When you click "View on Shopee", you go to Shopee with our affiliate link — your price stays the same.
h_data: Prices and stock: real-time from Shopee API (refreshed every 4 hours)
Reviews: from real buyers on Shopee — unedited, never paid for
Price history: every price change tracked, used to flag "lowest price in 90 days"
Security: we don't collect card details or accounts — we don't sell anything ourselves
about.h_money: When you click through to Shopee and buy, we earn a commission from the Shopee Affiliate Program (your price doesn't change). That money pays for the infrastructure and new features. We don't accept advertising or sponsorships — no banners, no pop-ups.
h_promise: We don't pay for reviews — every review is from a real buyer
We don't rank by who pays more — same algorithm for every shop
We don't collect personal data — no login, no signup
Disclosure: every Shopee link is an affiliate link — we earn a commission
